name: Teachings of the Elements
text: This province gets +1 strength for each claimed ring.

name: Border Fortress
text: Action: During a conflict at this province, choose a facedown province – reveal that province.

name: Upholding Authority
text:
This province gets +2 strength while you have an Earth role.
Interrupt: When this province is broken – the attacking player reveals his or her hand. Choose a card in their hand and discard any number of copies of that card from their hand.

name: Apprentice Earthcaller
text: Action: During a conflict, choose an attacking character without attachments – until the end of the conflict, set that character's skill values to its printed values.

name: Kuni Yori
text:
During [earth] conflicts, each character you control gets +1[mil] and +1[pol].
Action: During a conflict, lose 1 honor. Choose a player – that player discards 1 card at random from his or her hand.

name: Asahina Takako
text:
You may look at facedown cards in each province you control.
Action: Choose a card in one of your provinces – switch that card with a card in another of your provinces or discard it.

name: Bonsai Garden
text: Action: During an [air] conflict – gain 1 honor.

name: Impulsive Novice
text: This character gets +1[mil] and +1[pol] while you have claimed the [fire] or [void] ring.

name: Court Novice
text: This character gets +2[pol] while you have claimed the [air] or [water] ring.

name: Sneaky Shinjo
text: Reaction: After you pass in the dynasty phase – play this character from your province.

name: Marauding Oni
text:
This character cannot be honored or dishonored.
Forced Reaction: After this character is declared as an attacker or defender – lose 1 honor. (Unlimited.)

name: Spreading the Darkness
text: Action: Lose 2 honor. Choose a participating character you control – until the end of the conflict, that character gets +4[mil] and cannot be targeted by opponents' card abilities.

name: Adopted Kin
text:
Fire role only. Limit 1 per character.
Each other attachment on attached character gains ancestral.

name: Ikoma Reservist
text: This character gets +2[mil] while you have claimed the [fire] or [water] ring.

name: Writ of Authority
text:
Earth role only. Restricted.
If an opponent is more honorable than you, discard this attachment.

name: Feral Ningyo
text: Action: During a [water] conflict – put this character into play from your hand in the conflict. At the end of the conflict, shuffle it into your conflict deck.

name: Oracle of Stone
text: Action: Each player draws two cards. Then, each player discards 2 cards from his or her hand.

name: Tainted Koku
text: Interrupt: When attached character leaves play – move this attachment to another character controlled by the same player.

name: Press of Battle
text:
Water role only.
Action: During a [mil] conflict, if you control more participating characters than your opponent, choose a non-unique participating character – bow that character.

name: Sabotage
text:
Earth role only.
Action: During a [mil] conflict, choose a card in an opponent's province – discard that card.
